problem id: bd30ccbd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  10100010 -> 01000100
  10011110 -> 00100011
  11010000 -> 10011010
  00101001 -> 01101101
  11010110 -> 01101010
  11110010 -> 11001110
  10010100 -> 00110010
  11010010 -> 11001010

query: 11100011
predicted answer: 01100100
